message:
Fix libdeflate clone regression: correct deflate buffer sizing, add fallbacks

Root cause: libdeflate level 0 uses 5000-byte blocks (vs old code's 16383),
so the output buffer formula underestimated overhead for files >65KB.
Objects silently failed to compress, were skipped from packfiles.

Fixes:
- Size deflate output buffer using libdeflate's actual block size (5000 bytes)
- Add node:zlib fallback in readObject when WASM decompression fails
- Add null check for WASM alloc in zlibInflate
- Reuse libdeflate compressor/decompressor (singleton pattern, no per-call malloc)
- Wrap zlibDeflate in try/catch in packfile-builder

Tested: all stress tests pass (100-10K synthetic + 16K node_modules)
